meta.coverage_definition: TestSprite requirement coverage for the scoped PRD

tests.title: Space connected knowledge backend and retrieval coverage

steps.description: Create users, a space, hierarchy nodes, and indexed connector documents in the real test database.
Attach accessible exact document IDs and hierarchy node IDs to the space through shipped DB/API helper paths.
Reload connected knowledge and project detail snapshots and verify the selected docs/nodes persist.
Verify viewer users cannot update connected knowledge and inaccessible document/node selections are rejected.
Run SearchTool._run_search_for_query with the project's connected-source SearchParams and ACL filters.
Verify selected public docs/folder docs return, but owner-only selected docs do not return for a viewer.

tests.title: Space connected knowledge frontend modal and upload regression

steps.description: Render SpaceConnectedKnowledgeModal and SpaceConnectedSourcesSection through React Testing Library.
Verify Connected sources and Uploaded files are distinct tabs/sections.
Toggle a mocked shipped SourceHierarchyBrowser document and folder selection and click Save.
Verify the real onSave handler receives exact document IDs and hierarchy node IDs.
Verify the connected-source rail renders connector selections separately from Space Files.
Run existing ProjectsContext upload regression tests.
Create a real temporary Space through the app API and open /app/spaces/{slug}-{id} as an authenticated admin.
Verify no duplicated Threads/Customize tabs, details rail sections, and pinned ask-question input.
Open the connected-source picker from the right rail.
Verify Connected sources and Uploaded files tabs render with local upload controls.
If selectable connector hierarchy rows exist, select one, save, reload, and verify the selected label in the rail; otherwise log the honest empty-state branch.
Verify links, skills, scheduled tasks, and sharing affordances still work in the same real Space flow.

tests.title: Spaces right rail add files and edit details regression

steps.description: Create/open a real Space detail page as admin.
Verify detail sections render in the compact right rail.
Open the compact Add files popover.
Verify compact add-files controls remain usable after connected-source rail additions.
Edit details and save a description.
Verify the edited description is visible.
Run existing pure helper tests for the Deep Spaces surface that the connected-source flow shares.
Verify link, skill, grouping, scheduled task, accent, slug, and share constants continue to pass.
